title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Tensions spike in the Middle East
slides.explanation: Oil prices jumped after the US launched new strikes on Iran. Iran has also warned ships not to use the Strait of Hormuz without permission.

slides.headline: New US strikes on Iran
slides.explanation: These attacks are part of an ongoing exchange of fire between the two nations. A ceasefire deal from June is now falling apart.

slides.headline: Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71
slides.explanation: The South Carolina senator and Trump ally passed away suddenly. Reports indicate his death was likely caused by heart issues.

slides.headline: Conflict spreads in the region
slides.explanation: The US military says it hit 140 targets in Iran. In response, Iran reportedly fired toward Jordan and other Gulf states.

slides.headline: Shipping routes under threat
slides.explanation: The US is targeting Iranian military capabilities to protect shipping lanes. The standoff over the Strait of Hormuz is getting worse.

caption: The situation in the Middle East is escalating rapidly following a new wave of US strikes. Meanwhile, we are mourning the loss of a prominent US senator. Stay informed with the latest updates on these major stories. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: Apple's car project left a tech legacy
slides.explanation: Apple's self-driving car project may have failed, but it helped build the powerful AI chips inside today's iPhones. The team needed advanced on-device processing for the car, which paved the way for current AI capabilities.

slides.headline: A decade of Pokémon Go
slides.explanation: It has been 10 years since Pokémon Go changed mobile gaming. The team behind the game says its lasting success comes down to one simple goal: bringing people together.

slides.headline: Lorde isn't a fan of AI glasses
slides.explanation: Singer Lorde recently spoke out against AI smart glasses during a concert. While she didn't name a specific brand, her comments came during a festival sponsored by Ray-Ban, which makes glasses with Meta.

slides.headline: Gaming as a family activity
slides.explanation: For many, video games are more than just entertainment. One writer shares how playing games helped them bond with their son, turning screen time into a shared family experience.

slides.headline: Gamer wins legal battle against Microsoft
slides.explanation: An Xbox user successfully sued Microsoft to get their account and digital library restored. As part of the ruling, the company must also pay the user about $400 in damages.

caption: From the legacy of Apple's car project to a win for Xbox gamers, here is what is happening in tech today. Stay updated with the stories that matter most. Catch the full details on the Headlinne app. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
